pkgmetadata.longdescription: lesscode-python lesscode-python tornadoweb 1. 2. 3. 4. 5. 6. 7. 8. PostgreSQL pip install -U lesscode-py 1. 2. 1. HandlerBaseHandler 2. Handler 3. GetMappingPostMapping 4. level1level2 Handler(level1) class DemoHandler(BaseHandler) GetMapping(level2) def query_demo(self) return lesscode-pythonHandlerhandlers define(handler_path, defaulthandlers, typestr, help) options.handler_path xxx3. 1. config.py 2. config_dev.py 3. config_release.py 4. config_prod.py profile define(profile, defaultprofiles.config, typestr, help) 1options.profile dev 2--profiledev 4. CRITICAL ERROR WARNING INFO DEBUG NOTSET 10-DEBUG 20-INFO 30-WARNING 40-ERROR 50-CRITICAL options.logging INFO timesize options.log_rotate_mode time options.log_file_prefix log S M H D W interval0 midnight options.log_rotate_when D options.log_file_num_backups 30 5. BusinessException raise BusinessException(StatusCode.USER_REGISTER_FAIL , raise BusinessException(StatusCode.REQUIRED_PARAM_IS_EMPTY(message)) 6. ResponseResult self[status] status_code[0] self[message] status_code[1] self[data] data self[timestamp] datetime.now().strftime(Y-m-d HMS.f) { status 00000, message , data lesscode-python, timestamp 2021-11-18 162007.823522 }8. StatusCode 1. A 2. B 3. C SUCCESS (00000, ) FAIL (99999, ) USER_VALIDATE_FAIL (A0001, ) USER_REGISTER_FAIL (A0100, ) USER_NAME_VALIDATE_FAIL (A0110, ) USER_NAME_EXIST (A0111, ) USER_NAME_INVALID (A0112, ) PASSWORD_VALIDATE_FAIL (A0120, ) PASSWORD_LENGTH_VALID (A0121, ) SHORT_MESSAGE_VALID_FAIL (A0130, ) VALIDATE_CODE_ERROR (A0131, ) USER_LOGIN_EXCEPTION (A0200, ) USER_ACCOUNT_NOT_EXIST (A0201, ) REQUEST_PARAM_ERROR (A0300, ) INVALID_USER_INPUT (A0301, ) REQUIRED_PARAM_IS_EMPTY (A0310, {}) INVALID_TIME_STAMP (A0311, ) USER_INPUT_INVALID (A0312, ) VALIDATE_CODE_EXPIRE (A0400, ) FORM_VALIDATE_FAIL (A0401, ) PARAM_VALIDATE_FAIL (A0402, ) PARAM_BIND_FAIL (A0403, ) PHONE_NUM_NOT_FOUND (A0404, ) PHONE_ALREADY_REGISTER (A0405, ) ACCESS_DENIED (B0001, ) RESOURCE_DISABLED (B0002, ) RESOURCE_NO_AUTHORITY (B0003, ) BUSINESS_FAIL (B0000, {}) RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND (B0404, ) TIMEOUT (B0100, ) STRIKE_RECOVERY (B0200, ) RPC_INVOKE_ERROR (C0001, ) SERVER_ERROR (C0002, ) UNKNOWN_ERROR (C0003, ) 1. Fork 2. Feat_xxx 3. 4. Pull Request 1. 2. 3. 4. API 5. 6. ......
